title: Coulter
html:
Coulter

Stub. Grants Pass HS counselor / advisor / staff member with whom Yahir scheduled an academic-planning meeting on Sept 5, 2020 (early COVID era senior year). First mentioned in 2020 09 05 coulter questions — agenda included in-person help availability, class changes, AP schedule, sourcing, and "Bridge Quest." Specific role and first name unknown; promote / disambiguate on 2nd mention.
